title: Hardness Patch
description: Allows users to adjust the hardness values of all blocks (modded and vanilla) using their block ID and a float value.
body:
Allows users to adjust the hardness values of *all* blocks (modded and vanilla) using their block ID and a float value.

**THIS MOD MUST BE ON BOTH THE SERVER AND THE CLIENT!**

Uses a convenient configuration screen using Cloth Config API. Alternatively, you can edit `hardnesspatch.json5`.

Changes made to the config should apply immediately without reloading the world/game.
Requires [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) and [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

This mod does not seem to work properly in [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) multiplayer. Hopefully I can fix this sometime soon.
